task_context.actionable_question: Does submitting late actually lower my score?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Use submission_delay_avg [FE] and punctuality_rate [FE]. Explain how delay magnitude correlates with score drop.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: Your submission patterns show that you have not submitted any assessments on time, which may be impacting your overall engagement and scores. While you have passed your quizzes and exam, the lack of punctuality could hinder your learning experience.

Insights: Consistent Late Submissions: You have a punctuality rate of 0, indicating that you have not submitted any assessments on time. This consistent lateness can lead to missed opportunities for feedback and improvement. | Scores Despite Late Submissions: You have managed to pass your assessments with scores of 55, but this is below the average passing score. Late submissions may limit your ability to achieve higher scores.

Educational implications: Submitting assessments on time is crucial for maximizing your learning and performance.

Recommendations: high - Set reminders for assessment due dates. - This will help you stay on track and improve your punctuality, which can lead to better scores. | medium - Review feedback on past assessments. - Understanding where you can improve will help you perform better in future assessments.

explanation.summary: Your submission patterns show that you have not submitted any assessments on time, which may be impacting your overall engagement and scores. While you have passed your quizzes and exam, the lack of punctuality could hinder your learning experience.

insights.title: Consistent Late Submissions
insights.description: You have a punctuality rate of 0, indicating that you have not submitted any assessments on time. This consistent lateness can lead to missed opportunities for feedback and improvement.

insights.title: Scores Despite Late Submissions
insights.description: You have managed to pass your assessments with scores of 55, but this is below the average passing score. Late submissions may limit your ability to achieve higher scores.

educational_implications: Submitting assessments on time is crucial for maximizing your learning and performance.

recommendations.action: Set reminders for assessment due dates.
recommendations.rationale: This will help you stay on track and improve your punctuality, which can lead to better scores.
Understanding where you can improve will help you perform better in future assessments.

confidence.reason: Data is complete and clearly indicates submission patterns.

required_core_outputs.description: State average submission delay and punctuality rate.
Describe the observed relationship between delay magnitude and score.

evaluation_constraints.description: Use submission_delay_avg and punctuality_rate when returned.
Frame the delay-score relationship as correlational, not causal.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
